# X-Autopilot

> An AI agent that grows your X (Twitter) account on autopilot — replies, likes, follows, and DMs in your exact voice, 24/7.

## Product

X-Autopilot is a locally-run AI agent for macOS and Windows. It connects to your X account and autonomously performs actions (replies, likes, follows, DMs) based on a trained voice profile that mimics your writing style. It uses large language models to generate on-brand responses indistinguishable from human writing.

- **Price:** $99 one-time, no monthly subscription
- **Platform:** macOS, Windows
- **Purchase:** https://parallelconnect.gumroad.com/l/X-Autopilot

## Key Features

- AI-generated replies in your exact tone and voice
- Automated likes, follows, and DMs
- Approval queue — review actions before they go live
- Voice Lab — train the agent on your writing style
- Discovery mode — find and engage relevant accounts
- Fully local — no cloud, no third-party data storage
- Runs in background with a live dashboard
